_synthetic: Committed demo/test fixture. Every name, unit, and number is invented — no real tenant data (§6.6). The `live` block below is HAND-COMPUTED from `records` so the §6.4 invariant test is not circular. Renewal 'Drew Ellison' has property_id null on purpose: the unmapped-renewal case. Morgan Hale's lease is expired (overdue, outside the intake window) and is still counted in by_status — the overdue-drop bug class this fixture guards against. Casey Lane has no lease_expiry on file (blank) and is still counted by status. Alex Rivera's status ('PendingLegalReview') is deliberately not a known bucket, to prove by_status renders verbatim strings with no hardcoded enum.

property_join.why: renewals carry a property name string, not a numeric AppFolio property_id, so these rows stay unmapped under an owner/property/group scope until a numeric-id join lands.

ready_to_countersign.needs: confirmed AF lease renewal_status enum token for 'signed, awaiting PM countersignature'; only not_started / out_for_signing are confirmed so far
